svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="aRVern Top-Level Block Diagram" id="arvern_top"> <mxGraphModel dx="1441" dy="1091" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1280" pageHeight="780" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="Y47fIgJJb_D0C--MLujf-2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=default;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="600" width="1020" x="30" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="instahb" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=15;fillColor=#fff0d8;strokeColor=#cc8400;fontColor=#4a2e00;fontSize=12;" value="Instruction
AHB" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="80" x="60" y="319" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arvern" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fafafa;strokeColor=#222222;strokeWidth=2;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;container=0;collapsible=0;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingTop=8;spacingLeft=15;" value="arvern (core)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="430" width="670" x="200" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dataahb" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=15;fillColor=#fff0d8;strokeColor=#cc8400;fontColor=#4a2e00;fontSize=12;" value="Data
AHB" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="80" x="920" y="201" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hclken" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ede7f6;strokeColor=#4527a0;fontColor=#1a0050;fontSize=11;" value="hclk_en_o" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="907" y="431" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lockup" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ede7f6;strokeColor=#4527a0;fontColor=#1a0050;fontSize=11;" value="lockup_o" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="907" y="483" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="irqs" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e8f4fd;strokeColor=#0366d6;fontColor=#03204c;fontSize=12;" value="IRQs + NMI" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="120" x="400" y="610" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zicntr" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e8f4fd;strokeColor=#0366d6;fontColor=#03204c;fontSize=12;" value="Zicntr time port" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="560" y="610" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ccsr" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=15;fillColor=#fff0d8;strokeColor=#cc8400;fontColor=#4a2e00;fontSize=12;" value="Custom
CSR" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="80" x="740" y="600" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_inst_fetch" edge="1" parent="1" source="instahb" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;startArrow=classic;startFill=1;endArrow=classic;endFill=1;exitX=0.979;exitY=0.516;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;"
